events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** (medium risk) because the calibration lacks recorded as-found/as-left values, which ISA-based calibration practice and site QC require to verify pre-adjustment condition and drift trending — a documentation/QC compliance gap that must be corrected before acceptance, regardless of whether the instrument itself is functioning.
